mission.title: Install and Configure The Update Framework (TUF)
mission.description: TUF (The Update Framework) is a CNCF graduated specification and Python reference implementation for securing software update systems against key compromise and other attacks.

steps.title: Install python-tuf via pip
steps.description:
Install the TUF Python reference implementation.

```bash
pip install tuf
```

> Requires Python 3.9+.

steps.title: Verify installation
steps.description:
Confirm TUF is installed.

```bash
python3 -c "import tuf; print(tuf.__version__)"
```

steps.title: Initialize a TUF repository
steps.description:
Create a basic TUF repository structure for testing.

```bash
python3 -c "
from tuf.api.metadata import Root, Timestamp, Snapshot, Targets
print('TUF metadata classes loaded successfully')
"
```

> TUF provides Python APIs for creating and managing update metadata.
commands: python3 -c "from tuf.api.metadata import Root, Timestamp, Snapshot, Targets; print('TUF metadata classes loaded successfully')"
